/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PathVisualizer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/PathVisualizer.dir/PathVisualizer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PathVisualizer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PathVisualizer.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PathVisualizer.dir/graph.cpp.o -o PathVisualizer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libexpat.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbz2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
